summary: Classify the game family by available_actions BEFORE planning. Click-only, directional, mixed, score-mode, special-rotation each demand different exploration shapes. Wrong family -> wasted exploration.
when_to_apply: first turn of every new env
required_steps: emit family label as cited_card or hypothesis
failure_signal: agent runs BFS over all action ids without family decision

summary: A probe is the smallest action that yields a discriminating observation between rival hypotheses. Do not run full plans before probing assumptions.
when_to_apply: any turn where rival hypotheses are alive
required_steps: name the rival hypotheses (A vs B)
design one action whose result will rule out at least one
failure_signal: probe is so generic it cannot rule anything out

summary: After every probe, explicitly update belief: which hypothesis was supported, which ruled out, what new sub-hypotheses emerged. Without this update, probes are wasted.
failure_signal: observed_diff recorded but belief field empty or unchanged

summary: Before fine actions, scan the global frame for object inventory, role tags, and dependency structure. Skipping this leads to local optima and stuck states.
when_to_apply: first 1-3 turns of every new env, plus whenever family changes
failure_signal: acting on first 1-2 visible objects without inventory

summary: Each turn is OBSERVE -> REFLECT -> PLAN -> ACT. Skipping reflect or plan stages reduces the loop to reaction and prevents memory accumulation.
required_steps: OBSERVE: read frame + state vars + last 5 turns
PLAN: choose action that probes or progresses
ACT: emit action JSON with all required fields
failure_signal: action emitted without reflect/plan phase logged

summary: When sources conflict, prefer: env observation > method card > level metadata > failed-action blacklist > state-var registry. Never let memory or vibes override env truth.
when_to_apply: any conflict between recalled belief and current env state
required_steps: enumerate sources speaking to the question
update lower-precedence sources to match higher
failure_signal: agent insists on cached belief after env contradicts

summary: Build a registry of state variables observed during play (zone counters, toggle states, unlocked elements). The runner-side registry is more reliable than asking the model to remember.
required_steps: if diff localizes to a region/object, name it as a state var
failure_signal: state_vars empty after 3 turns with non-trivial diffs

summary: BFS over single-button or single-action assumptions misses coupled-state effects (one click triggers many). Always check whether an action is multi-effect before treating it as atomic.
when_to_apply: click-multibutton family, or any time observed_diff exceeds expected single-effect
required_steps: check overlap regions for click sites
mark action as coupled if multi-effect detected
failure_signal: BFS terminates with no solution when coupled-state would have solved it

summary: Do not retry (state_hash, action_key) pairs that already failed. After three no-progress turns in the same zone, switch zone or hypothesis. Repeated same_state+same_action is the hallmark of stuck loops.
required_steps: if zone counter shows 3 no-progress in same zone, switch zone

summary: If model output cannot be parsed into a valid action JSON, the turn must hard-fail. Fallback parsing that rescues malformed output trains the model to be sloppy and pollutes the dataset.
failure_signal: degraded parse silently fed into env.step

summary: PASS criteria for any level/game must come from env runtime, never from trace metadata. levels_completed in a JSON file is not a pass.
required_steps: emit PASS only on env-derived agreement
failure_signal: reporting PASS based on file metadata

summary: Full clear is not full score. Many ARC games have hidden efficiency thresholds; clearing all levels still under-scores if action count exceeds threshold. Track completion and efficiency separately.
required_steps: never collapse the three into a single PASS
failure_signal: agent celebrates 6/6 clear when single-game score is below 100
